## Checklist

- [ ] The app is still a **single self-contained `index.html`** (no build step, no dependencies)
- [ ] **No external network requests** were added (no CDN scripts, fonts, analytics, or remote assets)
- [ ] Tested in a **secure context** (`https://` or `http://localhost`, not `file://`)
- [ ] I read the code I changed and it does what the description says
- [ ] Docs/comments updated if the behavior changed
